## Type of Change

- [ ] ➕ New opportunity addition
- [ ] 🚫 Mark listing as expired / closed
- [ ] ✏️ Fix incorrect information (link, location, title, etc.)
- [ ] 📚 Resource page update (timeline, resume, interview, networking, FAQ)
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (formatting, broken image, etc.)
- [ ] 🧹 Other (describe below)

## Checklist

- [ ] I followed the [formatting rules](../CONTRIBUTING.md#formatting-rules) in `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] I checked for duplicate entries before adding a new row
- [ ] Links point to official company pages (no invented or guessed URLs)
- [ ] I used the correct status emoji from the legend
- [ ] Tables render correctly in Markdown preview
- [ ] This PR does not include referral, affiliate, or paid placement links
